TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv_Cawcingsan, title = Cawcingsan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Seediq]}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/wiki/Cawcingsan} }

S.FORM: = Cawcingsan = Cawcingsan ksun o, ga daya bi Yeynpingsecyuy na Pingtingpu hiya, kika ksun balay gaga mrijing mllug dgiyaq, hruan hidaw o msttu hari kiya, gqian hidaw o ida mdowras balay kiya. Hruan hidaw hiya o ida mqliwaq balay hruan hidaw, kndadax dhiyaq qmita o saw bi gagi kiya ni thnganan dha haya da. Mhiyug daya bi dgiyaq o, ida qtaan kana ka mgpajiq qhuni Ocya ni qnpahan bunga, ga rmgrig babaw qnpahan ka klalay ni qduda, tduwa smkaway qmita eyyayung Mtudu, Funghwangsan , Cicitasan uri, mpgqi siida ka hidaw do, ida mpslukah bi lnglungan sjiqun.
S.PHON: = ¶aw ¶iŇčsan = ¶aw ¶iŇčsan ksun o, ga daja bi j…ônpiŇčs…ô ¶juj na piŇčtiŇčpu ńßija, kika ksun balaj gaga m…ĺi…üiŇč mllug dgijaq, ńß…ĺuan ńßidaw o msttu ńßa…ĺi kija, gqian ńßidaw o ida mdow…ĺas balaj kija. ńß…ĺuan ńßidaw ńßija o ida mqliwaq balaj ńß…ĺuan ńßidaw, kndadax dńßijaq qmita o saw bi gagi kija ni tńßŇčanan dńßa ńßaja da. mńßijug daja bi dgijaq o, ida qtaan kana ka mgpa…üiq qńßuni o ¶ja ni qnpańßan buŇča, ga …ĺmg…ĺig babaw qnpańßan ka klalaj ni qduda, tduwa smkawaj qmita …ôjajuŇč mtudu, *uŇčńßwaŇčsan , ¶i ¶itasan u…ĺi, mpgqi siida ka ńßidaw do, ida mpslukańß bi lŇčluŇčan s…üiqun.
S.FORM: = Cawcingsan = Cawcingsan ksun o, ga daya bi Yeynpingsecyuy na Pingtingpu hiya, kika ksun balay gaga mrijing mllug dgiyaq, hruan hidaw o msttu hari kiya, gqian hidaw o ida mdowras balay kiya. Hruan hidaw hiya o ida mqliwaq balay hruan hidaw, kndadax dhiyaq qmita o saw bi gagi kiya ni thnganan dha haya da. Mhiyug daya bi dgiyaq o, ida qtaan kana ka mgpajiq qhuni Ocya ni qnpahan bunga, ga rmgrig babaw qnpahan ka klalay ni qduda, tduwa smkaway qmita eyyayung Mtudu, Funghwangsan , Cicitasan uri, mpgqi siida ka hidaw do, ida mpslukah bi lnglungan sjiqun.
S.PHON: = ¶aw ¶iŇčsan = ¶aw ¶iŇčsan ksun o, ga daja bi j…ônpiŇčs…ô ¶juj na piŇčtiŇčpu ńßija, kika ksun balaj gaga m…ĺi…üiŇč mllug dgijaq, ńß…ĺuan ńßidaw o msttu ńßa…ĺi kija, gqian ńßidaw o ida mdow…ĺas balaj kija. ńß…ĺuan ńßidaw ńßija o ida mqliwaq balaj ńß…ĺuan ńßidaw, kndadax dńßijaq qmita o saw bi gagi kija ni tńßŇčanan dńßa ńßaja da. mńßijug daja bi dgijaq o, ida qtaan kana ka mgpa…üiq qńßuni o ¶ja ni qnpańßan buŇča, ga …ĺmg…ĺig babaw qnpańßan ka klalaj ni qduda, tduwa smkawaj qmita …ôjajuŇč mtudu, *uŇčńßwaŇčsan , ¶i ¶itasan u…ĺi, mpgqi siida ka ńßidaw do, ida mpslukańß bi lŇčluŇčan s…üiqun.
